title: Tempting Silky Pudding
description: A creamy and delicious dessert made with silky pudding and topped with a layer of tempting yogurt.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the silky pudding mix and granulated sugar. Whisk until well combined.
Add in the vanilla extract and whisk until smooth.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Remove from heat and stir in the unsalted butter until melted.
Pour the pudding mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, top with tempting yogurt and serve chilled.
